zh.lifeSummary: 當William d' Clopton於1336年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Walter De Clopton39歲，母親Alice Fitzhugh37歲。他於1344年與Mary Cockerell在英國英格蘭艾可托培斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1377年在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William d' Clopton于1336年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Walter De Clopton39岁，母亲Alice Fitzhugh37岁。他于1344年与Mary Cockerell在英国英格兰艾可托培斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1377年在他的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William d' Clopton was born in 1336, in Suffolk, England, his father, Walter De Clopton, was 39 and his mother, Alice Fitzhugh, was 37. He married Mary Cockerell in 1344, in Toppesfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1377, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William d' Clopton est né en 1336, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter De Clopton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice Fitzhugh, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Mary Cockerell en 1344, à Toppesfield, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1377, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William d' Clopton 1336 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter De Clopton 39 und seine Mutter Alice Fitzhugh 37. Er hat 1344 in Toppesfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom Mary Cockerell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1377 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William d' Clopton è nato il nel 1336 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Walter De Clopton, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Alice Fitzhugh, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Mary Cockerell nel 1344, nel Toppesfield, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1377, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William d' Cloptonが1336年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Walter De Cloptonは39歳，母Alice Fitzhughは37歳であった。1344年にイギリスイギリスエセックストップエスフィールドでMary Cockerellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1377年に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William d' Clopton(이)가 1336년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter De Clopton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Fitzhugh(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 토페스필드에서 Mary Cockerell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1377년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William d' Clopton nasceu em 1336, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter De Clopton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice Fitzhugh, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Cockerell em 1344, em Toppesfield, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1377, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William d' Clopton родился в 1336 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter De Clopton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Fitzhugh, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Cockerell в 1344 г. в местности топпесфиелд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1377 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William d' Clopton nació en 1336, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter De Clopton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alice Fitzhugh, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Mary Cockerell en 1344, en Toppesfield, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1377, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra.
